current_short_description: PHYBOT appears in Humanoid.guide's humanoid robotics product directory with products PHYBOT C1 and PHYBOT M1.

弗瑞柏集团成立于1918年，其子公司POSITAL一直专注于编码器、倾角仪等专业市场，并始终致力于成为市场的领导者。POSITAL的产品包括：增量式、绝对值编码器、倾角仪，拉线式编码器以及最新推出的基于韦根技术的无电池Kit编码器。POSITAL传统的增量式和绝对值编码器，有着高精度、高分辨率、高防护等级、多种安装方式和通讯接口可供选择等特点，在各行各业有着出色的表现。在倾角仪产品领域，POSITAL有着丰富的应用经验，其AKS动态倾角仪系列，利用3D陀螺仪和加速度检测，并结合先进的算法，能够最大程度消除运动对角度值的干扰，从而得到稳定的输出信号，广泛应用于挖掘机、吊车等运动工程机械中。开拓创新是POSITAL的一贯精神，最近新推出的Kit编码器就是最好的证明。Kit编码器体积小巧，最小直径只有22mm，安装方便。其核心韦根传感器，具有能量采集功能，因此Kit编码器无需电池供电，无机械损耗，降低了维护成本，广泛应用于伺服电机，AGV，机器人等高科技自动化领域。随着工业4.0和智能制造的脚步临近，我们会坚持以客户为中心和行业领者的定位，为工业自动化领域贡献出POSITAL的智慧和力量。
source_names: CeMAT ASIA Robotics and Logistics Automation Exhibitors

current_short_description: Quantified Energy Labs (QE Labs) Pte. Ltd. was founded in 2019 and is an official deep tech spin-off company from the National University of Singapore (NUS). We offer a semi-autonomous drone coupled electroluminescence (EL) inspection service for Photovoltaic (PV) power plants to enable rapid identification of defective PV modules. Our proprietary service incorporates EL inspection technology and state-of-the-art Artificial Intelligence (AI) algorithms to identify defective PV modules accurately, enabling PV asset owners reap massive financial benefits through timely replacement of defective modules. We provide full-site EL inspection for low performance system inspection, PV system Site-Acceptance-Testing, quantify damage for insurance claims, and quality due diligence at the point of asset transaction..

current_short_description: Safety Systems and Computer Vision for Factories

SESTO Robotics is a leading solutions provider of Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR) technology enabling companies worldwide to derive the benefits of Industry 4.0 Headquartered in Singapore, SESTO Robotics is a leading robotics company in the field of autonomous technology. Our Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs) and Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) are fully developed in-house and powered by our proprietary operating system that is characterised by cutting-edge intelligence and tasking capabilities. Our class-leading and innovative products are proven to integrate seamlessly into various backend systems as well as physical infrastructures and have helped manufacturers worldwide deliver mission critical results through high uptime, scalability and ease of operation. With SESTO AMRs and AGVs, we enable companies to derive the benefits of Industry 4.0 by achieving efficiency through automation, flexibility and agility in manufacturing that are supported by data-driven decision making.
